General.Name: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp.
General.Description: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp., a shipping company, owns and operates tanker vessels worldwide. It operates a fleet of 16 tanker vessels comprising eight modern Suezmax tankers and eight modern VLCC tankers focusing on the transportation of crude oil. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Neo Faliro, Greece.
General.Address: Ethnarchou Makariou Ave., Neo Faliro, Greece, 185 47
